scripts.deploy-prepare: git switch -c gh-pages-deploy origin/gh-pages && git merge main && rm -rf node_modules/.cache
scripts.deploy-build: next build && next export && touch out/.nojekyll && git add -f out/ && git commit -m "Deploy Next.js to gh-pages" && git subtree push --prefix out origin gh-pages
scripts.deploy-cleanup: git switch main && git branch -D gh-pages-deploy
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy-prepare && npm run deploy-build && npm run deploy-cleanup
